name: meeting_request
description: Work meeting request with Zoom link

input.subject: Team Sync - Q1 Planning
input.body_text:
Hi Team,

Let's schedule our Q1 planning meeting for next week.

Date: Monday, January 27, 2026
Time: 2:00 PM - 3:30 PM PST
Location: Zoom (link below)

Join Zoom Meeting:
https://zoom.us/j/123456789

Agenda:
- Review Q4 results
- Set Q1 goals
- Discuss resource allocation

Please review the attached deck before the meeting.

Thanks,
Alice

events.title: Team Sync - Q1 Planning
events.description: Q1 planning meeting to review Q4 results and set Q1 goals
